subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the hem of the robe of Glory! Glorify, sanctify, and praise in the name of thy Lord, the Ever-Living, the Ancient, and say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تعلق باهداب رداء الکبریاء سبح و قدس و هلل باسم ربک الحی القدیم و قل
subcodes.subjects: @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @praise and encouragement
